title: go-toolset:ol8 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
delve
[1.25.2-1.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

[1.25.2-1]
- Update to Delve 1.25.2 (Sync from CentOS Stream 9)
- Related: RHEL-121223

golang
[1.25.5-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.5 (fips-1)
- Resolves: RHEL-139365
